name: Retrieve Medical Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Corporate History and Overview We were first incorporated in Nevada as Surf A Movie Solutions, Inc. on December 18, 2007 to engage in the business of the development sale and marketing of online video sales. We were not successful in our efforts and discontinued this line of business. Since that time and until August 8, 2014, we were a shell company (as such term is defined in Rule 12b-2 under the Exchange Act).
